title: Last Nite
content:
[Intro] [C]

[Verse 1]/n[C]Last night she said/n"Oh, baby, I [Dm]feel so down/nOh, it [G]turns me off/nWhen I [Em]feel left [Dm]out"/n[C]So I, I turned around/nOh, baby, [Dm]don't care no more/nI know [G]this for sure/nI'm walking [Em]out that [Dm]door/n[C]Well, I've been in town/nFor just 'bout fifteen minutes now/nOh, baby, I [Dm]feel so down/nAnd I don't [G]know why/nI keep [Em]walking for [Dm]miles

[Chorus]/n[F]But the people they don't under[G]stand/n[F]No, girlfriends, they can't under[G]stand/n[F]Your grandsons, they won't under[G]stand/n[F]On top of this, I ain't ever gonna under[G]stand

[Verse 2]/n[C]Last night she said/n"Oh, baby, I [Dm]feel so down/nOh, it [G]turns me off/nWhen I [Em]feel left [Dm]out"/n[C]So I, I turned around/nOh, baby, [Dm]gonna be alright/nIt was a [G]great big lie/nAs I [Em]left that [Dm]night, yeah

[Solo]/n[C] [F] [G]

[Chorus]

[Verse 3]/n[C]Last night she said/n"Oh, baby, I [Dm]feel so down/nOh, it [G]turns me off/nWhen I [Em]feel left [Dm]out"/n[C]So I, I turned around/nOh, little girl, I [Dm]don't care no more/nI know [G]this for sure/nI'm walking [Em]out that [Dm]door, yeah
